Career Journey

Professional Experience

Principal Software Engineer – Salesforce Architect & Technical Lead
Dell International Services, Bangalore
Nov 2016 – Present  |  Remote from September 2020
Architecture & Platform Leadership
  • Architected a global Salesforce Service Cloud CRM platform integrating Dell/EMC systems, enabling 40,000+ agents to deliver seamless omni-channel support across Chat, Email, Voice channels.
  • Adopted a hands-on architecture leadership role, defining and presenting Salesforce solutions to executives and working closely with enterprise architects to align with strategic goals.
  • Led CRM platform migration from Siebel to Salesforce, re-engineering legacy service flows into modern Service Cloud capabilities (Omni-Channel, Knowledge, Entitlements, Milestones).
  • Defined governance frameworks for metadata management, ensuring consistent reuse of permission sets, profiles, custom objects, and automation components across the org.
Key Achievements & Quantified Impact
  • Led onboarding of 25,000+ global tech support and customer care agents onto Salesforce Live Agent, reducing case resolution time by 20% and improving customer engagement consistency.
  • Orchestrated enterprise-wide onboarding of 40,000+ agents onto InGenius CTI, integrating Avaya, IVR, call routing, call recording, secure payment systems into a unified voice support experience.
  • Spearheaded implementation of Live Agent Chat with real-time Chat Translation, driving a 2% increase in CSAT and $4.5M/year in savings.
  • Architected the integration to GenAI models for automated summarization of chats, calls, cases and auto email compositions accelerating agent response times by 30%.
  • Developed a Multi-Select Routing Engine (MSRE) framework to automate case assignment across omni-channel case creation, improving accuracy and efficiency of case distribution.
Salesforce Development & Automation
  • Developed and maintained Apex Classes, Triggers, Batch, Queueable, and Scheduled jobs ensuring optimal performance, bulkification, and compliance with governor limits.
  • Built reusable Lightning Web Components (LWC) and Aura Components delivering dynamic, high-performance UIs integrated with Apex, LDS, and wire services; migrated legacy Aura Components to LWC.
  • Designed scalable data models including custom objects, lookup/master-detail relationships, record types, formula fields, and advanced validation rules for complex business workflows.
  • Automated business processes using Record-Triggered Flows, Screen Flows, Sub-flows, invocable Apex, fault paths, and dynamic UI screens; migrated legacy Process Builder/Workflow Rules to Flows.
  • Created secure, high-performance REST/SOAP API integrations leveraging Named Credentials, callouts, Platform Events, and Change Data Capture (CDC) for real-time communication.
Performance Optimization
  • Optimized Apex logic through bulkification, selective queries, caching strategies, and asynchronous patterns, improving transaction performance and staying within governor limits.
  • Refactored poorly performing SOQL/SOSL queries, redesigned relationships, and improved query selectivity — reducing query time and preventing runtime limits.
  • Enhanced LWC performance using efficient reactive variables, imperative Apex calls, lazy loading, and Lightning Data Service for faster UI rendering.
  • Improved Service Console performance by restructuring Record-Triggered Flows, eliminating redundant logic, and optimizing branching for faster case handling.
  • Introduced Platform Cache and optimized repeated data retrieval patterns, significantly lowering API calls and improving end-user experience.
  • Conducted performance audits on customer workloads, identifying bottlenecks in Apex, integrations, and Flows; delivered targeted fixes that improved system stability.
  • Optimized integration throughput using queueable/batch patterns, Platform Events, and improved retry & error-handling logic for high-volume systems.
  • Improved overall org performance by consolidating automation, restructuring triggers, reducing DML statements, and removing unused Apex/metadata components.
Service Cloud Delivery
  • Designed and configured Omni-Channel routing for intelligent distribution of cases, chats, and voice interactions; built scalable email-to-case and web-to-case frameworks with automated triaging and routing.
  • Implemented Salesforce Knowledge with bulk tagging of different taxonomies to Knowledge articles.
  • Customized Service Console with Lightning pages, highlights panels, utility items, and Quick Actions to optimize agent productivity.
  • Implemented Live Chat, Messaging, and Chatbots using Omni-Channel and custom LWC/Apex; integrated CTI/Telephony (Genesys/other providers) enabling click-to-dial, screen pops, call logging, and voice interaction tracking.
Security, Quality & Team Leadership
  • Configured profiles, permission sets, roles, OWDs, sharing rules, FLS, and permission boundaries to ensure a secure, scalable access model across global business units.
  • Led code reviews and performance guardrails, systematically identifying and driving remediation of technical debt; reduced org instability by optimizing slow-running queries and refactoring Apex.
  • Mentored junior developers on Apex, LWC, Flows, and deployments, accelerating team maturity and delivery speed across an 8-member feature team.
  • Delivered multiple cross-functional initiatives with on-time, high-quality releases and zero escalations, partnering closely with Product, QA, and interlock teams.
Senior Software Engineer – Siebel Open UI Developer
Accenture, Bangalore
Aug 2014 – Nov 2016
  • Led a high-performing feature team of 8 members, overseeing task delegation, technical delivery, and Agile ceremonies including Backlog Refinement, Sprint Planning, and Daily Scrums.
  • Applied deep expertise in Siebel Open UI Architecture to build responsive modern interfaces using HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and jQuery with Presentation Models (PM) and Physical Renderers (PR).
  • Administered Manifest Files and Manifest Expressions mapping custom JS/CSS files to Siebel objects; dynamically injected HTML elements into the Open UI layer while maintaining HI compatibility.
  • Configured Business Components, Business Objects, Integration Objects, Workflows, Task-Based UIs, and Business Services; leveraged advanced browser debugging to resolve complex Open UI defects.
Senior Systems Analyst – Siebel Developer
Speridian Technologies, Bangalore
Mar 2014 – Aug 2014
  • Engineered custom Open UI solutions used as benchmark demonstrations for prospective global clients.
  • Leveraged expertise in eScript and Workflows to deliver rapid-turnaround enhancements and high-priority system fixes; stabilized multiple project environments by diagnosing and resolving critical defects.
Software Dev Analyst – Siebel Developer
Dell International Services, Bangalore
Nov 2012 – Jan 2014
  • Authored comprehensive Technical Design Specifications (TDS) and led peer review sessions; appointed to a SWAT team for code optimization and refactoring, reducing system crashes by 30%.
  • Translated complex business needs into technical solutions using configuration, eScripting, and Siebel Workflows; engineered diverse applet types and designed complex Workflows and Task-Based UIs.
  • Managed database-level changes including new tables, column extensions, custom indexes, and user keys; drafted exhaustive unit test cases and resolved defects across DIT, SIT, and UAT phases.
Software Engineer – Siebel Developer
Tech Mahindra Ltd, Bangalore
Apr 2010 – Nov 2012
  • Engineered complex UI components including List/Form Applets, Pick Applets, MVGs, Shuttle Applets, Views, and Screens; implemented sophisticated Product eConfigurator solutions.
  • Executed end-to-end Siebel upgrade tasks (pre-upgrade prep to post-upgrade validation), resolved SRF compilation errors, and optimized Workflow Monitor Agents post-migration.
  • Resolved high-priority production incidents through deep-dive log analysis; managed LOVs, Responsibilities, Views, Users, Positions, and Runtime Events.
